role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund is an exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) that seeks to achieve its investment objective primarily though managed exposure to ADA futures contracts that trade only on an exchange registered with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (“ADA Futures Contracts”), and cash, cash-like instruments or high quality securities that serve as collateral to the fund’s investments in ADA Futures Contracts. It is non-diversified.
